question: How do you explain the 'chaos' of this design as a creative process?
hint: Ancestor / Old Paintings / Organize Style / Chaos
text: This is a 10th anniversary mega release. Think of it like a writer's mind—first, it's total chaos of ideas. Our designers pulled out all their old Lebo Blue paintings, the 'ancestor' designs, and organized them into this one piece. It's a creative journey made solid.

question: Describe the unique texture and finish of this 'stone painting' figure.
hint: Stone Painting / Rough Texture / Glossy Shine / Peachy
text: This isn't just vinyl. It's a 'stone painting' technique. Feel the rough, artistic texture on the surface, but then it has a glossy shine. The hands and feet have this special peachy tone. It's a collectible art piece you can touch.

question: Pitch the mega's value by comparing it to high-value art auctions.
hint: Auction / Millions of Dollars / Collective Cute / First Time
text: Listen, previous mega figures that look like this have sold for MILLIONS at auction. This is your first-time chance to own a 'collectible cute' piece with that same artistic weight, for a fraction of that price. It's an investment in art.

question: Demonstrate the 'magic' of the color-changing cup with a cold drink.
hint: Water Transfer / Change Color / Cold Drink / Eyes Appear
text: Watch this magic. The cup is white. But when I pour in a cold drink... BOOM. The color transfers, the design comes alive! See the eyes appear? It changes to this rad color. Any liquid under 5 degrees Celsius triggers it. It's a party trick in a cup.

question: Break down the high-quality materials and construction of the cup.
hint: Gloss Cover / Silicone Rubber / Protection / Durable
text: This isn't a cheap cup. The body is a high-gloss finish—super premium feel. The base is a soft silicone rubber. That's for protection, so it doesn't slam on your table. The rubber even comes off for easy washing. It's built to last.

question: How do you responsibly warn customers about what NOT to do with the cup (microwave/dishwasher)?
hint: Never Test / Don't Recommend / Microwave / Dishwasher
text: Full transparency, guys. We NEVER tested this in the microwave or dishwasher. So we DON'T recommend it. If you want to be 100% safe, hand wash the parts separately. Don't be the tester—treat it like the premium, hand-crafted item it is.
